name: UN Women 2010 (UN Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women)
summary: UN Women (United Nations Entity for Gender Equality and the Empowerment of Women) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UN-Women framework established by the UN General Assembly — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-gender-equality-and-women's-empowerment framework + UN-System-wide gender-equality coordination framework (UN Women established 2 July 2010 by UN General Assembly Resolution 64/289 + UN Women operations began 1 January 2011 + consolidating four UN entities Division for the Advancement of Women DAW + International Research and Training Institute for the Advancement of Women INSTRAW + Office of the Special Adviser on Gender Issues and Advancement of Women OSAGI + UN Development Fund for Women UNIFEM framework — formal foundational UN Women framework establishing comprehensive UN Women organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-gender-equality-and-women's-empowerment framework + UN-System-wide gender-equality coordination framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal four-UN-entity-consolidation 2010 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal CEDAW 1979 partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Beijing Platform for Action 1995 + 30th anniversary 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Generation Equality Forum 2021 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal SDG 5 Gender Equality framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Spotlight Initiative EU-UN-joint 2017 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Taliban-2021-women-erasure-from-public-life framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Iran-Mahsa-Amini-2022 Woman-Life-Freedom protests framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Gender-Apartheid-Codification movement 2023-2026 framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal CEDAW 1979 + UN Women partnership framework (Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women CEDAW adopted 18 December 1979 + effective 3 September 1981 + Optional Protocol 1999 + 189 state parties as of 2026 framework — formal foundational CEDAW + UN Women partnership framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-women's-rights framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal CEDAW + UN Women partnership framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal Beijing Platform for Action 1995 + 30th anniversary 2025 framework (Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action adopted 15 September 1995 at Fourth World Conference on Women Beijing China + Beijing+5 + Beijing+10 + Beijing+15 + Beijing+20 + Beijing+25 + Beijing+30 anniversary 2025 framework providing formal 12 critical areas of concern framework — formal foundational Beijing Platform for Action framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 12-critical-areas-of-concern framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 30-year-anniversary 2025 framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal Generation Equality Forum + Action Coalitions 2021 framework (Generation Equality Forum convened 29 March - 2 July 2021 in Mexico City Mexico + Paris France providing formal 6 Action Coalitions framework: gender-based violence + economic justice + bodily autonomy + climate justice + technology + innovation + feminist movements + leadership framework — formal foundational Generation Equality Forum + Action Coalitions framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 6 Action Coalitions framework). The UN Women Mandate is operating upon 90+ UN Women country offices + global coverage framework — comprehensive universal coverage framework. The Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal UN Women + CEDAW partnership framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal CEDAW + General Recommendation No. 35 on gender-based-violence 2017 framework + formal Optional Protocol to CEDAW individual-complaints procedure framework. The UN Women Executive Board + UN Women Executive Director + UN Women Secretariat are the formal UN Women bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The UN Women Mandate is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: UN Women Founding Resolution 2010 (UN General Assembly Resolution 64/289)
statutory_framework.title: UN Women Founding Resolution
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Women established 2 July 2010 by UN General Assembly Resolution 64/289 — formal foundational UN Women framework establishing comprehensive UN Women organisation framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women CEDAW 1979
statutory_framework.title: CEDAW
statutory_framework.relevance: Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women CEDAW adopted 18 December 1979 + effective 3 September 1981 — formal foundational CEDAW + UN Women partnership framework.

statutory_framework.citation: Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action 1995
statutory_framework.title: Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action
statutory_framework.relevance: Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action adopted 15 September 1995 at Fourth World Conference on Women Beijing China — formal foundational Beijing Platform for Action framework.

statutory_framework.title: Generation Equality Forum
statutory_framework.relevance: Generation Equality Forum convened 29 March - 2 July 2021 in Mexico City Mexico + Paris France — formal foundational Generation Equality Forum + 6 Action Coalitions framework.

statutory_framework.citation: UN Security Council Resolution 1325 (2000) Women, Peace and Security
statutory_framework.title: UN Security Council Resolution 1325
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Security Council Resolution 1325 adopted 31 October 2000 — formal foundational Women, Peace and Security framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Women Executive Board
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for UN Women.

apex_courts.name: UN Women Executive Director
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for UN Women — UN Women Executive Director Sima Bahous 2021-2025 + 2025+ next Executive Director framework.

apex_courts.name: UN Women Secretariat
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative body for UN Women.

apex_courts.name: UN Women Country Offices (90+ countries)
apex_courts.role: Formal UN Women country-level operations body.

anonymisation_convention: UN Women-related communications operate via state-state framework via UN Women Executive Board + UN General Assembly; individual communications under CEDAW Optional Protocol framework operate formal anonymisation convention.

key_developments.title: UN Commission on the Status of Women
key_developments.description: UN Commission on the Status of Women CSW established 21 June 1946 — predecessor framework to UN Women.

key_developments.title: First World Conference on Women Mexico City + International Women's Year
key_developments.description: First World Conference on Women held 19 June - 2 July 1975 in Mexico City Mexico + International Women's Year 1975 — formal foundational UN World Conference on Women framework operational.

key_developments.title: CEDAW adopted
key_developments.description: Convention on the Elimination of All Forms of Discrimination against Women CEDAW adopted 18 December 1979 — formal foundational CEDAW framework adopted.

key_developments.title: Fourth World Conference on Women Beijing
key_developments.description: Fourth World Conference on Women held 4-15 September 1995 in Beijing China + Beijing Declaration and Platform for Action adopted 15 September 1995 — formal foundational Beijing Platform for Action framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Security Council Resolution 1325 Women, Peace and Security
key_developments.description: UN Security Council Resolution 1325 adopted 31 October 2000 — formal foundational Women, Peace and Security framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Women established
key_developments.description: UN Women established 2 July 2010 by UN General Assembly Resolution 64/289 — formal foundational UN Women framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Women operations begin
key_developments.description: UN Women operations began 1 January 2011 + UN Women Executive Director Michelle Bachelet 2011-2013 first UN Women Executive Director framework — formal foundational UN Women operational framework operational.

key_developments.title: Spotlight Initiative EU-UN-joint + CEDAW General Recommendation 35
key_developments.description: Spotlight Initiative EU-UN-joint launched 20 September 2017 + CEDAW General Recommendation No. 35 on gender-based-violence adopted 14 July 2017 — formal foundational Spotlight Initiative + CEDAW General Recommendation 35 framework operational.

key_developments.title: Generation Equality Forum + Taliban-women-erasure
key_developments.description: Generation Equality Forum convened 29 March - 2 July 2021 in Mexico City Mexico + Paris France + Taliban took Kabul 15 August 2021 + Taliban-women-erasure-from-public-life framework — formal Generation Equality Forum + Taliban-women-erasure framework operational.

key_developments.title: Iran-Mahsa-Amini + Woman-Life-Freedom protests
key_developments.description: Mahsa Amini killed 16 September 2022 in Iran morality police custody + Woman-Life-Freedom Zan-Zendegi-Azadi protests Iran 2022-2023 framework — formal Iran-Mahsa-Amini Woman-Life-Freedom framework operational.

key_developments.title: Gender-Apartheid-Codification movement begins
key_developments.description: Gender-Apartheid-Codification movement begins 2023 advocating codification of Taliban + Iran gender-apartheid framework via international-criminal-law-codification — formal Gender-Apartheid-Codification movement framework operational.

key_developments.title: Beijing+30 anniversary
key_developments.description: Beijing+30 anniversary commemorated 2025 + 30 years of Beijing Platform for Action framework — formal Beijing+30 anniversary framework operational.

structural_findings: UN Women operates a supranational global framework — places UN Women in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-gender-equality-and-women's-empowerment framework + UN-System-wide gender-equality coordination framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-gender-equality-and-women's-empowerment framework + UN-System-wide gender-equality coordination framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal four-UN-entity-consolidation 2010 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal CEDAW 1979 partnership framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Beijing Platform for Action 1995 + 30th anniversary 2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Generation Equality Forum 2021 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal SDG 5 Gender Equality framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Spotlight Initiative EU-UN-joint 2017 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Taliban-2021-women-erasure-from-public-life framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Iran-Mahsa-Amini-2022 Woman-Life-Freedom protests framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Gender-Apartheid-Codification movement 2023-2026 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal CEDAW 1979 + UN Women partnership framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal international-women's-rights framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal CEDAW + UN Women partnership framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Beijing Platform for Action 1995 + 30th anniversary 2025 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 12-critical-areas-of-concern framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 30-year-anniversary 2025 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal Generation Equality Forum + Action Coalitions 2021 framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 6 Action Coalitions framework.
90+ UN Women country office + global coverage framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive universal coverage framework.

1946 CSW + 1975 First World Conference + Mexico City + International Women's Year + 1979 CEDAW + 1995 Beijing + 2000 SC 1325 + 2010 UN Women + 2011 operations + 2017 Spotlight + CEDAW GR 35 + 2021 Generation Equality + Taliban + 2022 Mahsa Amini + Woman-Life-Freedom + 2023 Gender Apartheid + 2025 Beijing+30 UN-Women-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

UN Women + CEDAW + Beijing Platform + Generation Equality Forum + SC 1325 Women Peace Security + Spotlight Initiative + Gender Apartheid Codification formal septet framework with formal CEDAW General Recommendation 35 on gender-based-violence + Optional Protocol individual-complaints procedure PA-intersection framework is structurally distinctive globally.
editorial_notes: UN Women jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-gender-equality-and-women's-empowerment foundational-UN-Women meta-framework (UN Women Founding Resolution 2010 + CEDAW 1979/1981 + Beijing Platform 1995 + Generation Equality Forum 2021 + SC 1325 2000 + Spotlight Initiative 2017 + CEDAW GR 35 2017 + Taliban-women-erasure 2021 + Mahsa Amini + Woman-Life-Freedom 2022 + Gender Apartheid Codification 2023 + Beijing+30 2025 + four-UN-entity-consolidation: DAW + INSTRAW + OSAGI + UNIFEM 2010 + 1946 CSW + 1975 First World Conference predecessor).
